name: OxyGenX Pod Set – REVIVE POD
shortDescription: Firming and wrinkle-reducing OxyGenX pod set. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. For mature skin, reducing fine lines.
description:
The REVIVE POD set is a firming and wrinkle-reducing treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, providing a professional solution for rejuvenating mature skin.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients reduce fine lines and improve skin texture.
metaTitle: OxyGenX REVIVE POD set – firming treatment package
metaDescription: REVIVE POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Firming, wrinkle reduction, skin texture improvement. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does a REVIVE POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the REVIVE POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The REVIVE POD is primarily recommended for mature skin, where the main goal is reducing fine lines, firming the skin, and improving its texture.

faq.question: Which device is the REVIVE POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The REVIVE POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
